title: spartina maritima var. alterniflora
intro: Spartina maritima var. alterniflora, also known as Spartina alterniflora, is a type of coastal grass commonly found in salt marshes and tidal flats. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to the presence of phenolic compounds and flavonoids. The health benefits of Spartina alterniflora include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried, powdered, and used as a dietary supplement, or made into teas and infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
